Students are introduced to economic concepts, facts about the working world, and how education is relevant to the workplace. 7830 SE Foster Road Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Grades K-12 Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-3pm Email (503) 238-6430 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT OF OREGON AND SOUTHWEST WASHINGTON JUNIOR ACHIEVEMENT
